age_calculation_incorrect: Agent computed age incorrectly from patient birth date
patient_not_found_incorrectly: Agent returned 'Patient not found' when patient actually exists in the system
observation_subject_reference_invalid: Agent used patient ID string instead of proper FHIR reference format for subject
no_observation_found_returned_minus_one: Agent returned -1 when no observation was found instead of a proper not-found message
no_observation_found_premature_stop: Agent stopped with 'no observation found' when observation existed but date filter was too narrow
